exploration_notes:
The full Deployment creation flow spans three layers:

**Layer 1 – Client library (client-go):** The `deployments` struct in `kubernetes/typed/apps/v1/deployment.go` embeds `gentype.ClientWithListAndApply`. The actual `Create()` method is defined generically in `gentype/type.go` (`Client[T].Create`), which builds a POST request via `c.client.Post().Resource(...).Body(obj).Do(ctx)`. `Request.Do()` in `rest/request.go` calls `Request.request()` which executes the HTTP POST to the API server.

**La
